notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Diamondbacks challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: Corbin Carroll steals (6) 3rd base.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Geraldo Perdomo singles on a soft bunt ground ball to third baseman Kyle Karros. Corbin Carroll to 3rd. Geraldo Perdomo to 2nd. Corbin Carroll advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by third baseman Kyle Karros.

notableEvents.label: Sterlin Thompson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Sterlin Thompson grounds out to first baseman Ildemaro Vargas.
